summary: Implemented specbridge-mcp-resources as a deterministic, read-only local CLI export for operator state. The command emits current-goal, doctor-fix-plan, and orchestration-summary MCP-style resources, writes the governed catalog artifact only through the exact -OutputPath with -Force required for replacement, and explicitly does not implement a live MCP server.
policy_result: Passed. All changed files are inside the issue-206 exclusive_write scope. No blocked scope touched. No live MCP server, workflow, dependency, network, secret, production, billing, authentication, authorization, database, CI/CD security, deployment, operator decision registry, issue #194, or digital twin changes were made.
risk_result: Within bounds. The new command reads repository state, runs doctor fix-plan only in offline mode, and writes only the governed catalog artifact when explicitly requested. No source state files are mutated by the no-OutputPath command path.
unresolved_risks: GitHub CI is pending until the branch is pushed and a PR is opened.
Doctor fix-plan in the generated catalog reports one non-blocking warning while the issue-206 scope is active and has no apply-mode ledger entry; post-merge closure should clear this state.
merge_status: Pending PR creation, GitHub CI, and merge gate.
